transcription.text: It seems like some portable CD players react to even the slightest bumps. Magnavox offers a portable CD player with electronic skip protection. So, even with a significant jolt, the music doesn't miss a beat. Magnavox. Smart. Very smart. Get a CD carrying case free when you buy select Magnavox portable CD players with ESP. See store for details.
